## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new component or variant
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — content update only
- [ ] `token` — design token change
- [ ] `react` — React component work
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / config

## Component(s) affected

<!-- e.g. Button, Input, tokens.css -->

## Changelog updated?

- [ ] Added entry to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Added `<tr>` to `docs/other/changelog.html`
- [ ] Bumped `--ds-version` in `tokens.css` and `DS_VERSION` in `ds.js`
- [ ] Updated `STATUS.md`
- [ ] (MINOR/MAJOR only) Updated 3 Latest Changes cards in `docs/index.html`

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded hex/rgba — all colors use CSS custom properties
- [ ] Dark mode tokens declared alongside light mode tokens
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Storybook stories updated (if React work)
- [ ] `NAV` / `SEARCH_DOCS` in `ds.js` updated (if new page added)
